title: health check api returns service status
description: Test the GET / endpoint to verify it returns a 200 status with JSON containing {status: 'ok', uptime, version} when the service is available.

title: device register api with valid authorization and payload
description: Test POST /device/register with valid Authorization header and payload {device_id, model, pairing_code} to ensure it returns 201 with {device_id, assigned_to_user} confirming successful registration.

title: device register api without authorization header
description: Test POST /device/register without Authorization header to verify it returns 401 Unauthorized.

title: device start api with valid device and batch parameters
description: Test POST /device/start with valid Authorization and payload {device_id, batch_params} to confirm it returns 200 with {session_id, status: 'started'} indicating session start.

title: device stop api with active session
description: Test POST /device/stop with valid Authorization and payload {device_id, session_id} for an active session to ensure it returns 200 with {session_id, status: 'stopped'} confirming session stop.

title: device update temperature with valid target
description: Test POST /device/update-temperature with valid Authorization and payload {device_id, target_temperature} within allowed range to verify it returns 200 with confirmation {device_id, target_temperature}.

title: device update fan speed with valid payload
description: Test POST /device/update-fan-speed with valid Authorization and payload {device_id, fan_speed} to confirm it returns 200 with confirmation {device_id, fan_speed}.

title: device list api with valid authorization
description: Test GET /device/list with valid Authorization header to verify it returns 200 with an array of devices belonging to the authenticated user.

title: session my sessions api with valid authorization
description: Test GET /session/my-sessions with valid Authorization header to ensure it returns 200 with an array of session objects including session_id, device_id, start_time, end_time, status, and metrics.

title: device start api without authorization header
description: Test POST /device/start without Authorization header to verify it returns 401 Unauthorized.

title: device update temperature with invalid string target
description: Test POST /device/update-temperature with valid Authorization but an invalid temperature format (e.g., a string) to verify it returns a 400 Bad Request error.
